scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:cli && bun run build:local-control && bun run build:web
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/sdk typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/local-control typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/sdk test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test && bun run --cwd apps/local-control test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
scripts.preflight: kill $(lsof -ti:3001) 2>/dev/null; kill $(lsof -ti:3010) 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; echo '✓ Ports 3001 + 3010 clear'
scripts.dev:blastoff: echo '🚀 CADET DEV BLAST OFF' && bun run preflight && (bun run --cwd apps/local-control dev &) && (bun run --cwd apps/web dev &) && (cargo run --manifest-path rust/starbridge-dioxus/Cargo.toml --bin starbridge-dioxus-ui --features desktop-ui &) && echo '🛰️  All systems nominal — local control :3010 | web :3001 | desktop launched' && wait
scripts.blastoff: echo '🚀 CADET BLAST OFF — Full build + launch sequence' && bun run preflight && bun run typecheck && bun run test && cargo test --workspace && cargo test --manifest-path spacetimedb/Cargo.toml --lib && spacetime build && bun run build && echo '✅ All checks green — igniting engines' && (bun run --cwd apps/local-control start &) && (bun run --cwd apps/web start &) && (cargo run --manifest-path rust/starbridge-dioxus/Cargo.toml --bin starbridge-dioxus-ui --features desktop-ui --release &) && echo '🛰️  ORBITAL INSERTION COMPLETE — all systems go' && wait
